mapper.insert: INSERT INTO package (biz_id, waybill_no, phone, courier, shelf, status, checkin_time, pickup_code, user_id) VALUES (#{bizId}, #{waybillNo}, #{phone}, #{courier}, #{shelf}, #{status}, #{checkinTime}, #{pickupCode}, #{userId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package WHERE DATE(checkin_time) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package WHERE status = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package WHERE status = 0 AND checkin_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 48 HOUR)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM package WHERE DATE(pickup_time) = CURDATE()
mapper.update: UPDATE package SET status = 1, pickup_time = NOW() WHERE biz_id = #{bizId} AND status = 0
UPDATE package SET waybill_no = #{waybillNo}, phone = #{phone}, courier = #{courier}, shelf = #{shelf}, pickup_code = #{pickupCode} WHERE biz_id = #{bizId} AND status = 0
